ksa_text: Knowledge of data serialization formats and their trade-offs for different workloads, including JSON, Apache Avro, Apache Parquet, and Protocol Buffers, with understanding of schema evolution, compression characteristics, and query performance implications.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how different file types can be used for anomalous behavior.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how different file types can be used for anomalous behavior.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-K-007 (TF, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3903 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.390, dcwf=0.373, ddat=0.358) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3903 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does TF-domain KSA TF-K-007 (composite 0.3903) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3903 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.3903 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3903, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
